summary: Configuration loader and normalizer for .launchdeck.yml files

findings.summary: Configuration loader and normalizer for .launchdeck.yml files
notes: Searches up the directory tree for config files (.launchdeck.yml/.yaml, launchdeck.yml/.yaml)
Config version must be 1, tasks object is required with at least one task
Task normalization: strings become shorthand {command}, objects support full spec (description, cwd, env, longRunning, ports, risk, log)
Path safety: cwd and log paths must stay inside project root (assertContainedPath)
Risk levels: low, medium (default), high, destructive
Environment variables cannot be null, coerced to strings
createSampleConfig generates a starter template with setup/build/test/dev tasks
